    • FIELD_FILTER

      public static final String FIELD_FILTER
      Property name for field-level filtering. When set on the MessageContext (or OperationContext), the value is a Set<String> of field names to include in the response. Fields not in the set are omitted during serialization.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
